---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something to add to the boilerplate
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? Who has this problem?

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've thought about and why you rejected them.

## Would you submit a PR?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional context
Any mockups, references, or examples.
